query:
INSERT INTO knowledge (title, content, category, tags, source, sourceType, createdAt)
SELECT 
  CONCAT('Query: ', SUBSTRING(query, 1, 100)) as title,
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'query', query,
    'response', response,
    'quality_score', qualityScore,
    'tier', tier,
    'cost', cost
  ) as content,
  'learned' as category,
  JSON_ARRAY('auto-learned', 'high-quality', CONCAT('tier-', tier)) as tags,
  CONCAT('Query ID: ', id) as source,
  'learning' as sourceType,
  createdAt
FROM queries
WHERE qualityScore >= 90
  AND response IS NOT NULL
  AND LENGTH(response) > 100
LIMIT 50;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_knowledge FROM knowledge;
